title: Simple Voice Chat Radios
description: This mod adds radios to the simple voice chat that can add players to groups based on the frequency to combine immersion and long range communication.
body:
This mod adds a radio that allows the player to set a specific frequency and connect to it in conjunction with the Simple Voice Chat mod. This helps to retain immersion, while still allowing players to have long range communication using the mod.

--------------

To use the radio, simply hold right click and you will join the band of frequency that it is set to. In order to change the frequency on the radio, shift and right click, and move the slider.

--------------

I’m open to suggestions or requests — feel free to reach out if you have a mod idea.

If you notice any bugs or have any suggestions please contact me at italianchef123@hotmail.com or on discord at italianchef123
